headline: Why Is Marvell Technology Stock Falling On Friday?
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. (MRVL) stock edges lower on Friday as investors engage in profit-taking following a massive monthly rally fueled by AI infrastructure demand and massive executive endorsements.
